text: SHREYAS (Scholarships for Higher Education for Young Achievers Scheme) Purpose: Umbrella scheme supporting SC, OBC, and EBC students through fellowships, overseas interest subsidies, and coaching. Eligibility: SC/OBC/EBC category; qualifying for UGC-NET/CSIR-NET (for fellowships) or securing overseas admission. Benefits: Monthly stipends (₹37,000–₹42,000), contingency allowances, and loan interest subsidies. Application: Online via UGC, Ministry, or NOS portals.

metadata.ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment

text: AICTE Pragati Scholarship Purpose: Support female students pursuing technical education. Eligibility: Female students in 1st year (or lateral entry 2nd year) of technical degree/diploma at AICTE institutions; family income < ₹8 lakh; max 2 girls per family. Benefits: ₹50,000 per annum (lump sum) for academic expenses. Application: Online via National Scholarship Portal (https://scholarships.gov.in/).

AICTE Saksham Scholarship Purpose: Support specially-abled students pursuing technical education. Eligibility: Admitted to technical degree/diploma at AICTE institution; disability ≥ 40%; family income < ₹8 lakh. Benefits: ₹50,000 per annum (lump sum) for academic expenses. Application: Online via National Scholarship Portal (https://scholarships.gov.in/).

NMMSS (National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship Scheme) Purpose: Reduce dropout rates by supporting meritorious EWS students. Eligibility: Students in Class 9-12 in govt/aided schools; scored 55% in Class 7; family income < ₹3.5 lakh. Selection via state-level MAT/SAT exam. Benefits: ₹12,000 per annum (₹1,000/month). Application: Online via NSP (https://scholarships.gov.in/) after exam qualification.

PM-YASASVI Scheme Purpose: Support students from OBC, EBC, and DNT communities for school and higher education. Eligibility: Enrolled in Class 9-12 or top-tier institutions (IITs/NITs); family income < ₹2.5 lakh. Benefits: Covers tuition fees, hostel/living expenses, and books. Application: Online via National Scholarship Portal (https://scholarships.gov.in/).

metadata.ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
